message:
feat(test): add restart scheduling type serde roundtrip and property tests

Cover RiskFactor, HazardReport, RestartMode, RestartSchedulerConfig,
ActivityProfile, HazardForecastPoint, RestartScoreBreakdown,
RestartRecommendation, and RestartScheduler with property-based tests.
38 → 66 tests.
